videos.headline: Habibio-Likio puts Oregon on the board with 3-yd TD run
videos.description: Oregon's Cyrus Habibi-Likio finds an opening in the San Jose State defense for a 3-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Herbert finds Johnson III for 39-yd Oregon TD
videos.description: Justin Herbert connects with Johnny Johnson III to complete a 39-yard Oregon touchdown.

videos.headline: Habibi-Likio scores his 2nd touchdown of game
videos.description: Oregon's Cyrus Habibi-Likio finds room and squeezes into the end zone for a one-yard Oregon touchdown.

videos.headline: Johhnson III catches his 2nd touchdown of game
